description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical dumbbell with a solid metal handle connecting two sets of round, black weight plates on either end. The handle appears to be made of steel, featuring a slightly textured or knurled grip for secure handling. Each end of the dumbbell is secured with a visible threaded collar or nut, ensuring the plates remain firmly in place during use. The weight plates are uniformly dark, likely coated in a matte or semi-glossy finish, and appear to be made of cast iron or steel. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for strength training in urban gyms, home garages, or outdoor fitness areas. There are no visible brand logos or weight markings on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sturdy, black dumbbell with a metal handle and round weight plates secured by threaded collars. The surface is matte and the design is simple and functional.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the circular end cap, central bolt, and the stacked round plates.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the dumbbell, the handle, and both sets of weight plates.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0 with the same circular end cap and bolt details.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, showing the handle and both sets of plates from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical, round cross-section, knurled metal grip for ergonomics.
attribute_end_cap_design: Round, flat end caps with a central bolt or nut, matte black finish, no visible patterns.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible wear, rust, or scratches.
